name: Fruity Yogurt Sipper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the banana into chunks.
2. In a blender container, combine the fruit, milk, yogurt, and sugar.
3. Cover and blend until smooth.
4. With the blender running, add the ice cubes one at a time through the opening in the lid.
5. Blend until smooth.
6. Serves 4-6 people.
